---
title: ""
---


:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
Hello!

I am a research fellow at the Department of Government, University of Vienna, where I am concluding my doctoral degree in Political Science. 
My research interests include legislative behavior, coalition politics, and party competition. 
I am particularly interested in the coalition politics in multiparty presidential systems, but also on learning new methods and techniques.

I like spending my free time testing which color pallet fits the best for my ggplots, and I always end up frustrated -- with the time I wasted on it, and because papers will end up being in grayscale anyway.

:::
::: {.column width="10%"}
:::
::: {.column width="40%"}
![](images/koichi.jpg)
:::
::::

<br>
Contact:

koichi.osamura[at]univie.ac.at\
University of Vienna\
Department of Government\
Rooseveltplatz 3, \
1090 Vienna, Austria
